DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, GLACIER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GLACIER JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC JOSEPH GRAY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, GLACIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAY, ERIC JOSEPH $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
